title: Cirrus: Change us-central1-a -> us-central1-f
body:
Currently that zone is experiencing capacity overages, causing VM
creation to stall and timeout.  Reported issue to cirrus-support,
they recommended switching to us-central1-f (and they tested it).
This commit makes all the necessary changes to switch zones.

Signed-off-by: Chris Evich <cevich@redhat.com>

comments.body: @mheon @baude okay, this will fix cirrus-ci (for now).  Unknown if we'll need to change it back later.

***Note***: This PR is optional.  It seems there was an actual problem (google was very late to report it):

https://status.cloud.google.com/incident/compute/18012

I don't think there's harm either way (merge or not).
